tests.name: Import server.app.app
tests.message: Successfully imported FastAPI app from server.app

tests.name: app.py imports from server.app correctly
tests.message: root app.py should import from server.app

tests.name: Broad Exception handling in call_llm()
tests.message: Uses `except Exception` to catch all OpenAI v1 exceptions
tests.details: APIConnectionError, APITimeoutError, AuthenticationError, etc. are subclasses of Exception

tests.name: Exception type logging
tests.message: Logs exception module and type for debugging
tests.details: Helps identify which OpenAI exception was raised

tests.name: Exception fallback return
tests.message: Returns safe default {} on API failure
tests.details: Prevents unhandled exceptions from crashing the script

tests.name: [STEP] line format
tests.message: Emits [STEP] with step, action, reward, done, error fields

tests.name: [END] line includes score field (CRITICAL)
tests.details: score field is mandatory in Phase 2

tests.name: Reward formatting (2 decimals)
tests.message: Formats rewards to 2 decimal places (0.00 format)

tests.name: [END] emitted on reset failure with score=0.00
tests.details: Ensures validator can parse output even on failure

tests.name: Fallback [STEP] line on inner exceptions
tests.message: Emits minimal valid [STEP] line when step loop fails
tests.details: Prevents output parsing from breaking on incomplete logs

tests.name: Fallback [STEP] emitted before break
tests.message: Ensures [STEP] is in log stream before exiting loop

tests.name: No parent directory paths in COPY
tests.message: Uses relative paths within build context
tests.details: Docker COPY cannot reference parent directories

tests.name: Correct CMD module path (server.app:app)
tests.message: CMD uses server.app:app instead of server:app

tests.name: Environment variable: MODEL_NAME
tests.message: MODEL_NAME not set (use defaults or set manually)

tests.name: Environment variable: API_BASE_URL
tests.message: API_BASE_URL not set (use defaults or set manually)

tests.name: Environment variable: HF_TOKEN
tests.message: HF_TOKEN not set (use defaults or set manually)

tests.name: Reads credentials from environment
tests.message: Uses os.getenv() for API_BASE_URL, MODEL_NAME, HF_TOKEN

tests.name: Score clamping to [0.0, 1.0]
tests.message: Uses min/max to constrain scores to valid range
tests.details: Prevents invalid scores from breaking validator

tests.name: Step limit defined
tests.message: inference.py should have bounded episode length
